build.buildCommand: npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate --schema=packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma && npm --workspace=@vms/shared run build && npm --workspace=@vms/api run build

deploy.startCommand: npx prisma db push --schema=packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma --skip-generate --accept-data-loss && npm --workspace=@vms/api start
